title: IMPROVING THE SYSTEM OF PROVIDING CITIZENS WITH HOUSING: ANALYSIS AND PROPOSALS
author: Allayarova Muattar
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Citizens’ housing needs are constantly growing due to urbanization, demographic changes and inflation. All actions related to the execution of the contract of purchase and sale of housing in the proper manner require timely, high-quality and thorough actions. This article discusses the procedure and stages of housing registration at the present time. The article also analyzes domestic and foreign experience related to the procedure and stages of housing registration, and provides suggestions of practical importance.
